# Chapter 10 Configuring Flash Reports

Configure the Flash Reports feature to send any Machine Accounting reports to specified email
addresses. Machine Accounting categorizes reports into the following types:

· Audit

· Bonus

· Cashless

· Dashboard

· GCB

· Machine Events

· Mag Card

· Slot Operation

· System Maintenance

When a report task is started, all reports within the task are generated and sent to the email
recipient(s).




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/157.2.png)




i
Permissions must be added to the appropriate user group in order to use the
Configure Flash Report tasks feature.


## 10.1 Adding Flash Report Tasks

To add a flash report task:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Configuration > Configure Flash Report Tasks. The
Flash Reports Manager window appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="157" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 10 Configuring Flash Reports" -->




![Figure 10-1 Flash Reports Manager](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/158.1.png)




2\. Click Add. The Add/Edit Flash Report window opens.




![Figure 10-2 Add/Edit Flash Report](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/158.2.png)




3\. In the Flash Report Settings section:

a. Enter the name of the flash report in the Flash Report Name field.

b. Enter the e-mail address to use when e-mailing a flash report in the Contact to Email

<!-- PageNumber="158" -->
<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 10 Configuring Flash Reports" -->

field.

c. Click the Task Group drop-down to select a task group under which the flash report
should appear.

d. Select Is Mandatory if this flash report must be completed before the period is
closed.

e. Select Is Active if this flash report task is active and shows as a task item.

f. Select Detail to generate a detailed report. If unchecked, the reports run in summary
mode.

4\. In the Available Reports section, select the report(s) for this flash report to contain.

5\. Click OK. The flash report is added, and the Flash Reports Manager window reappears.


## 10.2 Editing Flash Reports

To edit a flash report:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Configuration > Configure Flash Report Tasks. The
Flash Reports Manager window appears.

2\. Select a flash report, then click Edit. The Add/Edit Flash Report window appears.

3\. Modify the flash report details as needed.

4\. Click OK. The flash report is modified, and the Flash Reports Manager window
reappears.


## 10.3 Deleting Flash Reports

To delete a flash report:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Configuration > Configure Flash Report Tasks. The
Flash Reports Manager window appears.

2\. Select a flash report in the Flash Reports Manager window, then click Delete. A
confirmation prompt displays.

3\. Click Yes. The flash report is deleted, and the Flash Report Manager window reappears.
